title: Let's Create - ASD Union - SN
body:
# Survival with Machinery
## Created by steven novak

![Create Machinery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/377a675b16f6cf4d2bf51f7c52dc1b220f18fb8c_0.webp)

### Abstract
!! This Modpack is ONLY available for Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric !! 

This Modpack only includes vanilla mods + technology mods, there are **NO** magic related mods like custom bosses or mods that disrupt the natural feel of minecraft for example biomes o'plenty or custom animals.

### Modpack Information
General theme: Vanilla, peaceful, old survival feel, automation, factories, big machinery
Average FPS: 100 ~ 60
Suitable Computer: Low-end to high-end (Performance mod boost)
Loading time: 30s ~ 1min
Bugless Platforms Tested: Mac OS

### Server Information
IP: ```survivalwithmachinery.sdlf.fun```
General theme: Peaceful, Nations, Relaxing, Friends, Community
Enforcement Rules: 
- No griefing
- No disrespective language
- No hacking
Average TPS: 15~20
Average Players Online: 1 ~ 2
Average Latency: 100ms ~ 220ms


## Server Additional Mods
Land Claim:
